sessionStart.command: uv run --group harness python -m harness.hooks.bridge session_start --tool cursor

beforeShellExecution.command: uv run --group harness python -m harness.hooks.bridge shell_command_start --tool cursor

preToolUse.command: uv run --group harness python -m harness.hooks.bridge pre_file_write --tool cursor

stop.command: uv run --group harness python -m harness.hooks.bridge post_task_complete --tool cursor
